name: Wheat Wheat Wheat Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour cracked wheat into a bowl and add boiling water. Stir and let cool.
2. Bring all ingredients to room temperature. Pour remaining ingredients into the bakery unit, in order, then add wheat. Set "baking control" at 12 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" and press Start.
Note: This recipe was tested in a DAK 1-1/2 lb R2D2 bread machine. Sylvia's comment: HEAVY loaf! And hard to slice because it was so heavy; my electric knife really had to work to get through it. But it rose well. And if you want whole-grain flavor, this is it!
